title: X650C-H626DE-P-190901V209-190916V217_20190917201016
description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: X650C-H626DE-P-190916V217
Changed Functions:
1. Updated to the latest Google Security Patch 20190905
2. Updated the Yo party, Boomplay and Phone master apps
3. The XClub App just updates to V4.0.1, discover breaking news, funny jokes, and hot topics, also can gain xgold and gifts. Under workable network open XClub app to click the update button.
Optimized issue:
1. Improved rear camera clarity and optimized front camera white-balance effect
Reminding:
1 . Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2.Visit the XCLUB forum (http://bbs.infinixmobility.com) for more information.
